key_items: Michael Saylor signals BTC buy as MicroStrategy files $1.5B convertible note repurchase; STRC hits record $1.53B daily volume
Institutional accumulation accelerates: Mubadala raises Bitcoin ETF stake 16% to $566M, Italy's Intesa Sanpaolo doubles crypto holdings to $235M, Winklevoss twins invest $100M in Gemini
Regulatory tailwinds strengthen: Senate Banking Committee advances CLARITY Act (15-9 vote), Japan's major brokerages (SBI, Rakuten, Nomura) line up crypto investment trusts by 2028
reasoning: Strong institutional buying pressure from major corporations and sovereign wealth funds combined with positive regulatory developments (CLARITY Act advancement, Japan's crypto trust approvals) creates a solid bullish foundation despite macro headwinds. Bitcoin's pullback to $78-79K amid Treasury yield pressure represents a buying opportunity rather than capitulation, supported by on-chain signals showing long-term holder accumulation and whale positioning shifts.
risks: Macro uncertainty (Iran war tensions, Treasury yields at multi-month highs) and Bitcoin's failed hold above $79K could trigger a retest of $75K support if equities sell off sharply or risk-off sentiment intensifies.
